title: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

"Entrant [blue][a random 3-digit number][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold]."
notes:
This is a multi-branch event. After accepting as Decider, you face one of three randomly-selected trial scenarios, each with a Guilty or Innocent verdict choice:

**Merchant Trial**: A merchant accused of [red]murder[/red]. [green]Guilty[/green] verdict adds [red]Regret[/red] to your deck and grants 2 random relics. [green]Innocent[/green] verdict adds [red]Shame[/red] to your deck and upgrades 2 of your cards.

**Noble Trial**: A [gold]powerful noble[/gold] facing [purple]corruption charges[/purple]. [green]Guilty[/green] verdict heals you 10 HP. [green]Innocent[/green] verdict adds [red]Regret[/red] to your deck and grants 300 [gold]Gold[/gold].

**Nondescript Trial**: A woman charged with [red]theft[/red] and [purple]con-artistry[/purple]. Both [green]Guilty[/green] and [green]Innocent[/green] verdicts add [red]Doubt[/red] to your deck. [green]Guilty[/green] grants 2 card rewards, while [green]Innocent[/green] transforms 2 of your cards.

Attempting to Reject initially shows a warning page with the Grand Arbiter threatening death. You can still accept or Double Down to abandon the run entirely.
